Description: The Treasury in Petra carved into the red sandstone cliffs. I chose this place because I love ancient history and dream of walking through the Siq to see this view in real life.
Bright red torii gate and main shrine buildings at Fushimi Inari in Kyoto. I chose it because I love Japanese culture and want to walk through the endless torii gates.
Brooklyn Bridge and the New York City skyline at sunset with snow along the riverbank. I chose it because I want to experience the energy of New York and see this view in real life.
The Colosseum in Rome on a clear day with people walking around the ancient arena. I chose it because I love Roman history and want to imagine how it looked in the past.
Autumn trees in Greenwich Park with golden and orange leaves and a soft sky in the background. I chose it because I love peaceful autumn walks and the warm colors of the park.
Green rice terraces in Bali with palm trees and soft light over the hills. I chose it because I love peaceful tropical nature and want to walk between the terraces.
Green northern lights shining across the dark sky above snowy mountains and a still lake in Iceland. I chose it because seeing the aurora in person is one of my biggest travel dreams.
White houses and a busy harbor on a Greek island with clear turquoise water and small boats. I chose it because I dream of island-hopping in Greece and relaxing by the sea.

Wet cobblestone street leading to Galata Tower in Istanbul, with people walking between old buildings on a rainy day. I chose it because I love the cozy feeling of exploring historic streets in the rain.
